speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you both to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Louis is desperately trying to pull the boot of Thed up off his throat, but Thed's able to keep it down. He's pushing and pushing. He spits blood right in the face of Louis, like onto one of his eyes. The consciousness of Louis begins to fade, eyes roll back, and then eventually, as the rest of his body goes limp, they pull Thed off. "Yeah!" They cheer and lift him up and carry him off. They pull Louis up into a chair and start slapping him and pour water in his face. He comes to consciousness and spits out a tooth, and then the crowd's energy begins to die down a bit, and they drag them to different sides of the room and the people being to go about their business, get another drink at the bar.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that happen often in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's the fury of the small.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fight me right now! Do you want to do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're doing that, some of the crowd that had began to disperse suddenly turns and starts tapping each other.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You both charge into the center, starting seemingly with no purpose other then the necessary adrenaline to kickstart the rest of your evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not like it hasn't happened before.

preceding_turns.text: Do I get to roll twice?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Seven points of bludgeoning damage as she begins to pummel you repeatedly, across the front of the face, down into the side of the torso, and I need you to roll a constitution saving throw please, Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Suddenly your energy is instilled within your body, your vision goes wide, all the colors come into focus and you look up to see Jester to distract yourself from the sudden sensation you've never experienced before. The one thing you see is this fist connect with your chest, and you all watch as a series of blood vessels in the sides of Beauregard's face and neck suddenly burst and splash blood in different directions. You see white for a second. Your body racked with pain and you recoil briefly from the sudden shock to your system.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: With this flash of action, I mask my voice and go: I've got five gold on the horny one!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Boom! Boom! Boom! I'm going to do some Ip man like (punching noises). Like all the way down her spine. Right in the fucking ribs. Yeah, going for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb is stress chewing on the licorice root that he used to cast the spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't have your shield for this because you're fist fighting. So your AC is technically two lower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay the first one definitely hits with a 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, and then I'm going to spend a ki to do stunning strike.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As in one ki-- Do I have to-- Hang on. Sorry!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Roll damage and then do I do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And then she has to make a saving throw. I believe it's a constitution saving throw.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You feel this burst of poison begin to pulse through your veins. You are considered poisoned. As you guys all see this happen, you glance around and you can see a bunch of small shapes beginning to skitter from around some of the trees. This growling sound, almost barking sound. There's a few strange, furred wolves emerging from one side, two or three of them, their eyes glistening as the light from the fire manages to catch it from an angle. Behind them, these two heavy forms begin to emerge, and one of them goes, "Oh no! They've awakened! Gonah!" "I know, Emmett!" And we'll come back to roll initiative here as we're going to take a quick break.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But you can't see in the dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be a straight roll for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The lanterns, they're helping you see the close vicinity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say sure. How far can the lights go out? What's the range?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I think it's 60 feet? I bet that's wrong. It is 120 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ok, I'll roll the twins. Hey, really good. That's a 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 22? Nice. You guys are sitting there for a bit, enjoying the time by the fire, conversing. Caleb, you're keeping an eye out beyond the various tree trunks. You hear the snapping of a twig and you see some shifting of shadow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I just smack Beau and then--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit. Are they all on one? Do I see anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you glance around and he's pointing this out and you begin to come to consciousness--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At that moment, as soon as you finish casting Mage Armor, there's a little flash of arcane energy and two arrows come shooting out of the shadows, right towards you. Natural 20 and a six, which would bring it to ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The second does not hit, but the first one obviously does.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You suffer five points of piercing damage as the arrow catches you right in the left pectoral muscle, and I need you to make a constitution saving throw.

raw_text: To that note, everyone, I need you to roll initiative. Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And stay tuned because during the break, we're going to play the first episode of Key Question, because it's Deadpool related, and Deadpool's tomorrow. It's an edited version because it's a long episode but you get a sample. Okay bye.

preceding_turns.text: Welcome back, everybody. That was all right. Before we jump in, we do have a winner from the break for our fantastic Wyrmwood giveaway. The winner is Brian Spinkicker!
